input.background: We have established that prevalence proportions in the education and smoking illustrative data vary from 24% to 9%. Now we test the association for significance.
input.question: Test statistic. Table 18.1 lists observed counts. Table 18.11 lists expected counts. The Pearson's chi-square statistic is calculated.

observed_counts.value: Observed counts from Table 18.1 (specific values not provided in the problem statement)
observed_counts.description: The observed frequency counts of different categories in the data.

expected_counts.value: Expected counts from Table 18.11 (specific values not provided in the problem statement)
expected_counts.description: The expected frequency counts of different categories under the null hypothesis.

chi_square_statistic.description: The test statistic used to evaluate the significance of the association between variables.
